message:
core: implement bd-1hi.14 fountain-coded replication receiver (§3.4.2)

Receiver state machine (LISTENING→COLLECTING→DECODING→APPLYING→COMPLETE)
with per-changeset decoder sessions, V1 SBN rule enforcement, K_source
validation, ISI deduplication, changeset truncation to total_len, and
page xxh3 validation. 20 tests including E2E sender-receiver roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
